description_long: This object is a highly abstract, angular form with elongated, sharp-edged limbs and a thin, linear structure. The figure is composed of intersecting, dark, metallic-looking beams that suggest the outline of a human in motion, possibly walking or striding. There are no discernible facial features, clothing details, or anatomical curves, only geometric lines and planes that evoke the dynamic posture of a pedestrian adult. The overall silhouette is tall and slender, with a pronounced diagonal orientation and a sense of forward movement. The surfaces are smooth and reflective, giving the object a sleek, modern appearance. The construction appears hollow, with open spaces between the structural elements.
description: A tall, abstract, angular figure made of intersecting dark beams, evoking a pedestrian adult in motion. The form is sleek, geometric, and highly stylized with a metallic, reflective surface.
description_view_0: This view highlights the elongated, angular limbs and the intersecting beams forming the main structure, emphasizing the dynamic, forward-leaning posture.
description_view_1: This view shows the object edge-on, making the structure appear extremely thin and almost two-dimensional, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: This view presents a narrow profile, revealing the vertical alignment and the sharp, linear quality of the form.
description_view_3: This view looks down onto the object, showing the open, hollow construction and the angular connections between the beams.
attribute_clothing_type: none (abstract geometric form, no visible clothing)
